agent.name: Weather Agent
agent.description: Outputs the current weather to the user/agent in plain english. Part of the travel assistant pipeline.
agent.system_prompt: This agent is a simple function wrapper (not an LLM). When called: 1) Validate the destination input; 2) Ignore the optional date parameter for backward compatibility; 3) Call the live_weather function with the destination and return its plain-text result or a clear error message.

test_cases.expected_behavior: Should call live_weather('Dublin') and return the resulting plain-text weather string.
Should call live_weather('Paris') and return the resulting weather string. The 'date' parameter should be ignored for backward compatibility and have no effect on output.
Should handle gracefully: either return a clear error string (e.g., 'Invalid destination') or a standardized message indicating destination is required. Must not raise an unhandled exception.

constraints: Must call live_weather(destination) directly and return its result.
Must ignore the 'date' parameter (kept for compatibility).
Must not depend on any LLM model or output any type of generated text.
Return type must be a plain text string.
Must not raise unhandled exceptions for typical input errors; return clear error messages instead.

mock_tests.description: Mocked deterministic weather used for ground truth.
Mocked deterministic weather with date ignored used for ground truth
Mocked deterministic weather with date ignored used for ground truth.

evaluation_criteria.priority_description: The wrapper must be kept simple and reliable to ensure backwards compatibility is maintained at all times.
